title: mentha × kerneri var. calaminthiformis
intro: Mentha × kerneri var. calaminthiformis, also known as Bergamot Mint or Calamint Mint, is a hybrid plant of the mint family, specifically a cross between Mentha pulegium and Mentha requienii. It is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, as well as its ability to act as a natural digestive aid and to ease respiratory issues. The plant has been used to promote overall health and well-being, with reported benefits including relief from nausea, headaches, and stress, as well as improved digestion and reduced inflammation. Mentha × kerneri var. calaminthiformis can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to make topical creams and salves for skin and muscle relief.
